inputs.description: Implement Task 5 from the plan: Create scripts/chat/narrator.py (Stage 3 - scholarly response generation). Create tests/scripts/chat/test_narrator.py with mocked LLM. The narrator receives ExecutionResult + query, calls OpenAI with the scholar persona prompt (6 evidence rules from the spec), returns ScholarResponse. Must include: _build_narrator_prompt() that renders records/agents/directives/aggregations, _fallback_response() for LLM failure, grounding passthrough. Follow TDD steps exactly.
inputs.testCommand: cd /home/hagaybar/projects/rare-books-bot && poetry run pytest tests/scripts/chat/test_narrator.py -v 2>&1 | tail -40
